prompt:
An absorbent containment berm arranged in a loop on a lab or workshop floor, clearly positioned to isolate the spread of a small chemical spill and protect nearby drains. The material should look practical and purpose-built, with no splashy disaster melodrama.

Photorealistic 512×512 image with soft neutral lighting, realistic absorbent and floor textures, no logos, no readable labels, and no identifiable faces. Keep the berm centered and uncluttered.
